title: tanacetum sericeum
intro: Tanacetum sericeum, also known as Woolly Yarrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum sericeum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
